date_or_time_kst: 2026-07-06 Expo/Tutorial; 2026-07-07 to 2026-07-09 Main Conference; 2026-07-10 to 2026-07-11 Workshops
action_zh: 把 7 月 6 日当作熟悉场馆和 Expo/Tutorial 的导览日；7-9 日主攻主会，10-11 日按 workshop 主题拆分。
action_en: Treat July 6 as orientation plus Expo/Tutorial day; prioritize main conference July 7-9 and split July 10-11 by workshop themes.
notes: Official page confirms dates and day grouping.

action_zh: 首日先到 Hall B Foyer 取胸牌；workshop-only badge 可从 7 月 9 日 16:00 开始领取。
action_en: Go to Hall B Foyer first for badge pickup; workshop-only badges can be picked up starting July 9 at 16:00.
notes: Queue layout and final onsite access path should be checked on arrival.

item_zh: 注册二维码和胸牌字段
item_en: Registration QR code and badge fields
action_zh: 确认注册邮箱可访问；姓名、机构会印在胸牌上；二维码用于现场 check-in。
action_en: Make sure the registration email is accessible; first name, last name, and institution print on the badge; QR code is used for check-in.
notes: Registration receipt and QR code are emailed to the address in the profile.

action_zh: 离开酒店前检查胸牌；离开会场后可取下胸牌，避免暴露参会者身份。
action_en: Check badge before leaving the hotel; remove it offsite to avoid advertising attendee status.
notes: FAQ says attendees will not be allowed into the conference without a badge and includes safety advice.

action_zh: 第一次丢失可能需按剩余会议全价重买；24 小时内带两张胸牌回注册台可退款；第二次不退款。
action_en: First replacement may require buying a new registration for remaining sessions; refund is possible if both badges are returned within 24 hours; second replacement has no refund.
notes: Damaged or updated badges can be replaced for free.

action_zh: 不要转让或借用 badge；check-in 可能核对 ID 或学生证。
action_en: Do not transfer or lend badges; check-in may require ID or student ID matching registration.
notes: Registration is non-transferable and misuse can void registration.

action_zh: 学生价参会者带实体或数字学生证；指南里放到行前清单。
action_en: Student-rate attendees should carry student ID; include this in the pre-trip checklist.
notes: FAQ says student ID is required at registration and check-in.

action_zh: 用官方站保存 bookmark、下载/订阅个人日程；建议会前导出或离线保存重点 session。
action_en: Use the official site to save bookmarks and download/subscribe to personal schedules; export or save key sessions offline before arrival.
notes: The official site recommends JavaScript, a Chromium-based browser, and about 10 Mbps inbound bandwidth for full use.

action_zh: 把 Hall B Foyer 作为现场问题、失物、方向确认的第一站。
action_en: Use Hall B Foyer as the first stop for onsite questions, lost items, and directions.
notes: Registration desk exact hours still need onsite/app confirmation.

location_zh: 靠近 Hall A4 的 West Gate Entrance
location_en: Near West Gate Entrance by Hall A4
action_zh: 轻微医疗需求和紧急情况先去医疗办公室；现场也有流动 EMT/医疗人员。
action_en: For minor medical needs or emergencies, go to the medical office; EMT/medical staff also circulate in the venue.

location_zh: Hall B Foyer 的 Help Desk
location_en: Help Desk in Hall B Foyer
action_zh: 失物先去 Hall B Foyer；贵重物品仍按个人保管处理。
action_en: Check Hall B Foyer first for lost items; still treat valuables as personal responsibility.
notes: ICML page states ICML staff and COEX are not liable for lost, damaged, or stolen items.

action_zh: 到达日和退房后可优先利用；注意 7 月 10-11 日较早关闭。
action_en: Use it on arrival or post-checkout days; note the earlier closing time on July 10-11.

action_zh: 在地图/会场服务页单独标注，减少现场询问成本。
action_en: Mark these separately in the venue services section to reduce onsite friction.

location_en: 3rd floor restrooms on the right-hand side of the Auditorium
action_zh: 在无障碍/包容性信息下标注。
action_en: Include under accessibility and inclusion notes.

item_zh: 无障碍洗手间和轮椅租借
location_zh: COEX 1F/2F/3F/4F；轮椅可在 1F West Gate 旁 Safety Situation Room 和 East Gate Information Desk 租借
location_en: COEX 1F/2F/3F/4F; wheelchairs at the Safety Situation Room near West Gate on 1F and the Information Desk by East Gate
action_zh: 需要无障碍支持者提前邮件联系 inclusion-accessibility-chairs@icml.cc。
action_en: Attendees with onsite needs should email inclusion-accessibility-chairs@icml.cc ahead of time.
notes: ICML page lists counts of accessible restrooms by floor.

location_zh: COEX 2F ASEM 209；Starfield COEX Mall 内另有 Agasarangbang rooms
location_en: COEX 2F ASEM 209; additional Agasarangbang rooms in Starfield COEX Mall
action_zh: 放入亲子/照护信息。
action_en: Include in family and care logistics.

action_zh: 提前下载 app、离线保存日程和地图；不要把临场找论文/路线完全依赖 venue Wi-Fi。
action_en: Download the app and save schedules/maps offline; do not rely entirely on venue Wi-Fi for last-minute paper or route lookup.
notes: Official blog warns that venue wireless has limitations and may be degraded in crowded areas; SSID/password still need onsite confirmation.

item_zh: 茶歇/零食标签与特殊餐
action_zh: 有饮食限制者每次取餐前看标签；ICML 页提示没有 halal/kosher meal，需准备外部备选。
action_en: Attendees with dietary restrictions should check labels every time; ICML notes no halal/kosher meals, so prepare outside options.
notes: Guide should phrase this as an onsite planning warning, not a complete Seoul food statement.

location_zh: COEX / Starfield COEX Mall / 周边餐厅
location_en: COEX / Starfield COEX Mall / nearby restaurants
action_zh: 不要默认会方提供 box lunch；高峰期优先错峰或去 Parnas/Starfield 地下动线。
action_en: Do not assume conference box lunches; avoid peak queues or use the Parnas/Starfield underground options.
source_name: ICML virtual site / At the Conference
notes: Official site notes AM/PM breaks with food, coffee, and tea, but not boxed lunch.

action_zh: 只用会方提供的 approved tape；每张 poster 建议四角各一段；不要贴墙或非指定位置。
action_en: Use only conference-provided approved tape; use one piece per corner; do not hang posters on walls or outside designated boards.
source_name: ICML At the Conference / Poster Instructions
notes: AtTheConference also says volunteers in Hall A provide the tape.

location_zh: COEX East Gate 附近 Hall B2 poster pick-up area
location_en: Poster pickup area near Hall B2, East Gate, COEX
action_zh: 使用官方 Foster 打印服务者，带确认邮件并在展示当天取件。
action_en: If using the official Foster printing service, bring the confirmation email and pick up on the presentation day.
notes: Source contains a duplicated '7:30' in the Saturday line; keep as 07:30-12:30 and verify onsite.

action_zh: Main Conference 建议 36in 高 x 48/60/72in 宽；Workshop 不超过 36in 高 x 24in 宽且需竖版。
action_en: Main Conference suggests 36in high by 48/60/72in wide; workshop posters must not exceed 36in high by 24in wide and must be portrait.

date_or_time_kst: Recommended at least one week before conference starts
action_zh: 作者可上传 virtual poster、thumbnail、topic、slide deck、project page；topic 用于 poster 位置分配。
action_en: Authors can upload virtual poster, thumbnail, topic, slide deck, and project page; topic is used for poster position assignment.

item_zh: ICML 官方 COEX floor map
action_zh: 正式指南的会场图优先引用 ICML 官方 SVG，再叠加 Hall A、Hall B Foyer、Hall B1/B2、Auditorium 等锚点。
action_en: Use the ICML official SVG as the venue-map base, then overlay anchors such as Hall A, Hall B Foyer, Hall B1/B2, and Auditorium.
notes: Onsite signage should still be checked for entrance and queue changes.

action_zh: 把 Hall A/B、Hall B Foyer、West/East Gate、2F Plaetz、3F Auditorium 作为会场地图标注重点。
action_en: Mark Hall A/B, Hall B Foyer, West/East Gate, 2F Plaetz, and 3F Auditorium as key map anchors.
notes: Need combine with ICML's actual room assignments from official schedule/app.

action_zh: 把 Hall B1 当作招聘、产品 demo、infra/vendor 比较的主阵地；避开主会 poster 高峰。
action_en: Treat Hall B1 as the main recruiting, product-demo, and infra/vendor comparison area; avoid main-poster rush hours.
notes: Final booth map should be refreshed from app or onsite signage.

location_zh: Auditorium, Hall B2/C/D1/D2, Grand Ballroom Foyer 等
location_en: Auditorium, Hall B2/C/D1/D2, Grand Ballroom Foyer, etc.
action_zh: 把 7 月 6 日 Expo 作为比晚宴更稳定的公司技术入口，特别适合招聘/产品/研究合作线索。
action_en: Use July 6 Expo as a more reliable company-technology entry point than dinners, especially for recruiting, product, and collaboration leads.
notes: Detailed event list may change; refresh before publishing daily guide.

item_zh: Starfield COEX Mall 营业和客服
item_en: Starfield COEX Mall hours and customer center
location_zh: 513 Yeongdong-daero; B1 Live Plaza customer center
location_en: 513 Yeongdong-daero; B1 Live Plaza customer center
action_zh: 作为雨天、午餐、补给、失物、翻译/楼层咨询的默认点。
action_en: Use it as the default rainy-day, lunch, supplies, lost-and-found, interpretation, and floor-guide fallback.
notes: Operating hours vary by shop.

item_zh: Starfield 信息台和轮椅/婴儿车
item_en: Starfield information desks and wheelchair/stroller rental
action_zh: 需要轮椅、婴儿车、楼层咨询时可作为会场外备选。
action_en: Use as an off-conference backup for wheelchair, stroller, and floor-guide support.

action_zh: 作为会场内较晚营业的多人约饭/啤酒备选。
action_en: Use as a late-opening onsite option for group meals or beer.
notes: Current COEX page lists Devil's Door details; verify crowding and exact service during ICML.

location_en: Convenience stores, subway stations, airports, etc.
action_zh: 落地后尽早准备 Tmoney/EZL/WOWPASS/Climate Card；适合地铁、公交和部分线下支付。
action_en: Get a Tmoney/EZL/WOWPASS/Climate Card early; useful for subway, bus, and some offline payments.
notes: Cards can be purchased and charged at convenience stores nationwide.

action_zh: 使用交通卡并上下车刷卡，争取公交地铁换乘折扣。
action_en: Use and tap the transit card correctly to get bus/subway transfer discounts.
notes: Search snippet confirms KRW 100 and transfer discount details; page fetch was minimal.

action_zh: 带 Type C/F 两圆孔转换头；韩国标准为 220V/60Hz；检查设备是否支持 100-240V。
action_en: Bring Type C/F round-pin adapters; Korea uses 220V/60Hz; check whether devices support 100-240V.
notes: VisitKorea says adapters can be borrowed/purchased at hotels, airports, retail stores, duty-free shops, and convenience stores.

action_en: Police 112; fire/medical 119; infectious disease 1339; travel hotline +82-2-1330; Lost112 +82-2-182.
notes: 1330 supports Korean, English, Japanese, Chinese, Russian, Vietnamese, Thai, and Indonesian.

action_zh: 把 1330 旅游热线和 1345 immigration hotline 放到指南首页或 emergency card。
action_en: Put 1330 travel hotline and 1345 immigration hotline on the guide front page or emergency card.
notes: Seoul page lists domestic/international numbers for 120, 1330, and 1345.

action_zh: 按梅雨/闷热处理：带轻便雨具、可防水鞋、薄外套和水杯；尽量用 COEX/Starfield 室内动线。
action_en: Plan for monsoon-like humidity and rain: bring light rain gear, water-resistant shoes, a light layer, and a water bottle; prefer indoor COEX/Starfield routes.
source_url: web.weather: Seoul forecast captured 2026-07-02 for Jul 7-12
notes: Forecast showed rain/thunderstorm risk and very humid conditions from Jul 7-12; update daily during conference week.

action_zh: 会前安装 iOS/Android 官方 app；用于 QR code check-in、日程、本地保存和参会者聊天。
action_en: Install the official iOS/Android app before arriving; use it for QR-code check-in, schedule lookup, local saved schedules, and attendee chat.
notes: Android page: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.atonyman.icml ; iOS page: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/icml/id6759976518

action_zh: 想找工作/实习/industry connect 的参会者，注册后登录 Career Site 查看。
action_en: Attendees looking for jobs, internships, or industry connections should log into the Career Site after registration.
notes: Page says paid registration is required to view job postings.

action_zh: 把赞助商/booth 当作招聘、产品、研究合作路线；最终 booth list 和 booth map 需要会前再抓。
action_en: Treat sponsors/booths as recruiting, product, and research-collaboration routes; final booth list and map still need pre-conference refresh.
notes: Sponsor page links to exhibitors portal; public page notes recruitment database access in sponsor levels.

item_zh: 官方 Socials / Mentoring 定位
action_zh: 官方 socials 更适合研究交流；商业宣传/招聘应归到 sponsor/expo 或外部 side events。
action_en: Official socials are intended for research connections; commercial promotion and recruiting should be treated as sponsor/expo or external side-event material.
source_name: ICML Call for Socials and Mentoring Forums
notes: Useful for separating official social guide from company dinner guide.

action_zh: 只从 ICML 网站申请邀请信；不要用第三方 booking agency；需要先买 in-person registration。
action_en: Request invitation letters only from the ICML site; do not use third-party booking agencies; in-person registration is required.
notes: ICML page says ICML cannot provide a Business Registration Certificate.

action_zh: 若还没订房，只走 ICML hotel page 的 Resiada 链接；不要被第三方会议酒店代理误导。
action_en: If still booking, use the Resiada link on the ICML hotel page; avoid third-party conference-hotel agents.
notes: Availability changes quickly.

action_zh: 14-17 岁可随注册 guardian 免费入场但需 waiver；4 个月至 13 岁 childcare 已关闭且无 onsite reservation。
action_en: Ages 14-17 may attend free with a registered guardian and waiver; childcare for ages 4 months to 13 years is closed with no onsite reservations.
notes: Minors must remain with guardian and can attend only events without alcohol.
